name: bennett-studio
description: Bennett Studio — The Database Workspace for Modern Developers

scripts.build:desktop: cd desktop && npm run tauri build
scripts.build:all: npm run build:web && npm run build:desktop
scripts.lint: cd web && npm run lint && cd ../desktop && npm run lint
scripts.type-check: cd web && npm run type-check && cd ../desktop && npm run type-check
scripts.setup: npm install && cd web && npm install && cd ../desktop && npm install && cd ../e2e && npm install
